title: Israel hits railway bridge, threatens trains before Trump deadline expires
snippet: Israel Air Force bombed 8 rail sections and bridges in Iran including Tehran, Karaj, Tabriz, Kashan, Qom. Warned Iranians not to travel by train until 21:00 Iran time. At least 2 killed in Yahya Abad railway bridge strike in Kashan. All train services to/from Mashhad cancelled.
tag_reason: 이전 보고서에 없는 신규 사건: 이스라엘의 이란 철도/교량 공격은 새로운 에스컬레이션
